name: REDspace SPP (SuiteProjects Pro) MCP Server
description: MCP server exposing Redspace SuiteProjects Pro (SPP) APIs and project/resource tools for secure, schema-driven integration with LLMs, automations, and apps. Provides SPP authentication, project discovery, bookings, member/resource info, timesheets, and user info via robust API endpoints.

tools.description: Get the OAuth2 authentication URL for the user to sign in to Redspace SPP. Call this when the user needs to authenticate.
Get instructions for authenticating and using the Redspace SPP MCP tools.
List all projects in Redspace SPP. If the user is not authenticated, returns an authentication link. Optionally accepts filter, limit, and offset.
List all bookings in Redspace SPP. If the user is not authenticated, returns an authentication link. Optionally accepts filter, limit, and offset.
List all users (resources) assigned to a given SPP project. Accepts either a project ID or project name. Returns member details including name, email, and allocation percentage.
Get projects and tasks a user worked on during a specific week or day. Requires at least person_name or user_id. Returns time entries grouped by project and task.
Get detailed information about a person from SPP. Accepts a person name or user ID and returns profile fields including contact info, role, department, timezone, and location.

person_name.description: Full name, nickname, or email of the person

tools.description: Get your own user profile information from SPP. Uses the email from your request headers to fetch your authenticated user account details including contact info, role, department, timezone, and location.
